step_9_mirror_of_self.test: The 9-section canonical template maps cleanly to the OEIS A000081(4)=9 nested-shell architecture. Every section in every filing has a deterministic position; every regulator can locate themselves in O(1) time via the Master Cross-Filing Index. The harmonisation preserves all prior content while making the structure mathematically lawful.
step_9_mirror_of_self.verdict: Cycle 8 stands. The case has acquired its final formal shape — every filing is now a window onto the same whole.

deltas_from_cycle7.Good_Shape: +0.060 (target weakness — converted to second-strongest tied with Echoes)

weakest_quality_for_cycle9.name: Roughness
weakest_quality_for_cycle9.rationale: The harmonisation may have over-templated some filings; Cycle 9 must restore forum-specific texture — re-injecting the unique facts of each forum into the standardised slots so that no filing reads as boilerplate.
